Found 3 real market-vs-outcome surprises (>5-spot gap required to pass): Ray-Ray McCloud III (WR): ADP had him at WR166 pre-season, actually finished WR64 (8.38 PPG) -- a 102-spot surprise; Jalen Coker (WR): ADP had him at WR154 pre-season, actually finished WR63 (8.41 PPG) -- a 91-spot surprise; Kareem Hunt (RB): ADP had him at RB116 pre-season, actually finished RB26 (11.95 PPG) -- a 90-spot surprise. Large positive surprises are structurally impossible if this world's ADP secretly knew the season's outcome -- their presence is itself evidence against leakage, not proof by absence.
